questions.scenario: The receipt function times out after sending an email but before recording success. A retry runs. What design prevents duplicate receipts?

options.text: Record and check receipt-sent state by order ID or use an idempotency key.
Move the function to a random region.

questions.explanation: Retry-safe handlers need idempotent side effects.

questions.scenario: Before enabling retries for a function with side effects, what should the team ask?

options.text: What happens if the same logical event is handled twice?
Can we hide the event ID?
Can we skip all IAM review?
Can we make the timeout infinite?

questions.explanation: Retry behavior is safe only when repeated handling does not create wrong results.

questions.scenario: Which log fields help understand retried function work?

options.text: Attempt or retry context when available.

questions.explanation: Retry-aware logs connect multiple attempts to the same logical work.
